overview.title: OEV Network Overview
overview.description: Oracle Extractable Value (OEV) Network captures value from oracle updates and redistributes it to dApps and searchers

trend.title: OEV Trend (7 Days)
trend.description: Daily OEV captured and auction activity

realtime.title: Real-time Auctions
realtime.description: Latest OEV auctions across the network

mechanism.title: How OEV Network Works
mechanism.description: Understanding the OEV capture and redistribution mechanism

step1.title: 1. OEV Detection
step1.description: When oracle price updates occur, the OEV Network detects extractable value opportunities before they can be exploited by MEV bots.

step2.title: 2. Auction Process
step2.description: Searchers bid in transparent auctions for the right to capture OEV. The highest bidder wins and their bid goes to the dApp.

step3.title: 3. Value Distribution
step3.description: Captured value is distributed to dApps, searchers, and protocol participants, creating a fair and transparent MEV ecosystem.

info.title: About OEV Network
info.description: OEV (Oracle Extractable Value) Network is API3's solution for capturing and redistributing value from oracle updates. Unlike traditional MEV that benefits only miners/validators, OEV Network ensures that dApps and their users receive the value generated by oracle price movements.

q1.question: What's the difference between API3 and other oracles?
q1.answer: API3 uses first-party oracle architecture, getting data directly from API providers, eliminating middleman risk and providing higher transparency and security.

q2.question: How to choose the right dAPI?
q2.answer: Choose dAPI based on your application needs. Consider factors: asset type, update frequency, deviation threshold, supported chains, etc.

q3.question: What's the dAPI update frequency?
q3.answer: dAPI supports heartbeat updates and deviation-triggered updates. Heartbeat interval is usually 24 hours, deviation threshold varies by asset type.

q4.question: How to handle price anomalies?
q4.answer: It's recommended to implement price validation logic, compare multiple data sources, set reasonable deviation thresholds, and prepare fallback mechanisms.

anomaly.title: Anomaly Detection
anomaly.subtitle: Detect statistical anomalies using Z-score and IQR methods

anomaly.aboutDesc: Anomalies are detected using statistical methods. Z-score measures deviation from the mean, while IQR identifies outliers based on quartile ranges.
